---
id: create-webhook
title: "Create Webhook"
description: "Register a new signature webhook for the org. The `name` field is hardcoded to `signature` by the SDK. The returned `secret` is shown **once** — store it on receipt. It cannot be retrieved later; use Regenerate Webhook Secret if lost."
sidebar_label: "Create Webhook"

hide_table_of_contents: true
